title: Localization infrastructure and missing-key gate
summary: Implement the zh-CN/en localization runtime, locale detection, settings persistence and missing-key validation gate.
acceptance: Adds a localization layer for zh-CN and en with typed keys or equivalent validation
Defaults Chinese browser/system language to zh-CN and non-Chinese to en
Adds manual language override persistence without broad Electron authority
Adds missing-key and translation completeness validation that fails tests
Keeps developer diagnostics isolated from default player UI

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented zh-CN/en shell localization runtime, ADR-0011 locale detection, manual shell-local persistence, missing-key completeness gate, and opt-in diagnostics isolation; required checks passed including quality, typecheck, test, and focused web/desktop e2e.

verified: No blocking findings; verified zh-CN/en locale runtime, ADR-0011 detection, shell-local preference persistence, localization completeness gate, diagnostics opt-in isolation, preserved web e2e coverage, valid UTF-8 zh-CN catalog, and required checks passing.
Independent reviewer verified WM-0114; integration gate passed: localization validation, handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality, web-shell e2e and desktop-shell e2e.

review.summary: No blocking findings; verified zh-CN/en locale runtime, ADR-0011 detection, shell-local preference persistence, localization completeness gate, diagnostics opt-in isolation, preserved web e2e coverage, valid UTF-8 zh-CN catalog, and required checks passing.

integration.summary: Independent reviewer verified WM-0114; integration gate passed: localization validation, handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality, web-shell e2e and desktop-shell e2e.
